tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Transpose -1 to play in G Major !!


[Verse 1]
[tab]           [ch]Db[/ch]
I'd never met you, but I wanted[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Db6[/ch]
To invite you to the party[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Ab[/ch]
Then you walked in with those green eyes[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Abmaj7[/ch]
Never stolen by nobody[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Db[/ch]
And they flicker to the future[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Db6[/ch]
For a moment, I could picture[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Ab[/ch]
Then you touch me, and I come back[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Abmaj7[/ch]
And we're talking on the staircase[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Db[/ch]
'Bout your big dreams on the big screens[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Db6[/ch]                                 [ch]Ab[/ch]
Out of Georgia, now you're lonely in this city[/tab]
[tab]                          [ch]Abmaj7[/ch]
Lyin' with me and you're scared it's movin' quickly[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Db[/ch]
Oh, now you're crying, you're in pieces[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Db6[/ch]                             [ch]Ab[/ch]
'Cause the only love you've ever known is Jesus[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Ab[/ch]
I can feel it[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Abmaj7[/ch]
Oh, I hate that I'm the reason that you're[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]Fm[/ch] [ch]Eb/G[/ch] [ch]Ab[/ch]   [ch]Eb/G[/ch]  [ch]Db[/ch]
In your head right now[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Fm[/ch]    [ch]Eb/G[/ch] [ch]Ab[/ch] [ch]Eb/G[/ch] [ch]Db[/ch]
While your world is  spinning out[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]    [ch]Db[/ch]
So, slow it down[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Db[/ch]
Take a moment now[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Ab[/ch]
We're too young to drown[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]
Deep in dirty waters[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Db[/ch]
Full of hopeless doubt[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Db[/ch]
Let me pull you out[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Ab[/ch]
Let me hold you now[/tab]
       N.C.
Let me slow it down


[Verse 2]
[tab]          [ch]Db[/ch]
Ain't it funny how it changes[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Db[/ch]
How the future rearranges?[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Ab[/ch]
I get nervous, oh I'm anxious[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Ab[/ch]
Maybe loving you is dangerous[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Db[/ch]
I could lose you like the others[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Db[/ch]                             [ch]Ab[/ch]
Only girl that's never left me is my mother[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Ab[/ch]
Oh, I love her[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Ab[/ch]
And I know you'll probably hate it, but I'm[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]Fm[/ch] [ch]Eb/G[/ch] [ch]Ab[/ch]  [ch]Eb/G[/ch]  [ch]Db[/ch]
In my  head right now[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]    [ch]Db[/ch]
So, slow it down[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Db[/ch]
Take a moment now[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Ab[/ch]
We're too young to drown[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]
Deep in dirty waters[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Db[/ch]
Full of hopeless doubt[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Db[/ch]
Let me pull you out[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Ab[/ch]
Let me hold you now[/tab]
       N.C.
Let me— (Slow it down)


[Outro]
[tab] [ch]Db[/ch]
Slow it down[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]Bbm[/ch]             [ch]Ab[/ch]
When you're on the ground and you're crying (Slow it down)[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Ab[/ch]
I'm trying (Slow it down)[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Db[/ch]
To slow it down[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Bbm[/ch]                    [ch]Ab[/ch] [ch]Eb[/ch]
When you're spinning round in your head[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fm[/ch]  [ch]Eb/G[/ch] [ch]Ab[/ch]  [ch]Eb/G[/ch] [ch]Db[/ch]
Ooh-ooh-ooh, ooh-ooh[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Fm[/ch]   [ch]Eb/G[/ch] [ch]Ab[/ch] [ch]Eb/G[/ch]   [ch]Db[/ch]
I'll help you  slow  it down[/tab]
